title: Meet the new WAGS on the block: They might be brainy - with a lawyer and an AI expert among them - but they still love a wild party and a designer handbag, writes KATIE HIND
description: It's been 20 years since Coleen Rooney, Victoria Beckham, Alex Curran and Cheryl Tweedy were branded 'hooligans with visas' after their antics during the 2006 World Cup.

title: AI meets geopolitics
description: OpenAI’s global AI-governance push marks a new chapter of tech geopolitics, innovation, security and rivalry

title: AMD Taiwan AI Bet Tests Long Term Data Center Ambitions
description: AMD (NasdaqGS:AMD) announced a commitment of more than US$10b to support AI infrastructure in Taiwan. The company is pairing this investment with a major presence and expected product news at Computex Taipei. The move highlights Taiwan's role in the global AI hardware supply chain and AMD's focus on data center and AI growth areas. For investors tracking AI hardware, this update places AMD (NasdaqGS:AMD) in the middle of the buildout of global compute capacity. The company already competes...

title: Trump's AI post sparks row as US warns of war in the Middle East
description: Amid rising Mideast tensions, Trump posts an AI military portrait as the US signals war readiness. Iran denies any diplomatic deal, while the conflict between Israel and Lebanon escalates, with Israeli forces pushing deeper into Lebanese territory.

title: Quant AI and IBM launch contact centre agent Ava that resolves 84% of calls at Fortitude Re
description: IBM and Quant AI's contact center agent Ava resolves 84% of inbound calls, cutting average handle time from 11.5 to 8.5 minutes. The system is live with Fortitude Re, handling insurance queries in English and Spanish.
